currentAuditedSlice: Streamed Collider Publication / Core Physics Contacts / Browser Fallback Collision / Source Comparison / Canonical Collision Decision / First Visible Outcome Frame

selection.reason: No new, ledger-missing or root-undocumented eligible repository existed. PrehistoricRush had the oldest eligible central timestamp at selection.

committed run state is rendered without collision-source comparison or frame provenance

collisionAuthority.mainFinding: Core Physics and browser fallback collision paths evaluate related streamed collider descriptors without a shared collider revision, parity result, disagreement policy or visible-frame acknowledgement.
requiredProof: both sources cite one run tick candidate and collider-set revision
released collider generations have zero successor effects
canonical source and degradation policy are explicit
one collision result controls fail pickup and goal precedence
public readback and the first visible outcome frame cite the same decision
source built output and Pages fixtures agree
